title: analytics — canonical event-name catalog
description: Reserved event names used by first-party AnalyticsEventCapturer classes. Tenants may fire additional event names not on this list; this catalog is documentation + validation-assistance for the shipped capturers. Grouped by category. Every name is snake_case; a colon prefix indicates a scoped subresource (feature_used:calendar).
note: This is a CATALOG (opt-in registry), not an ENUM (closed set). event_name column accepts anything matching the pattern regex; unknown names still capture. The catalog is what the funnel + experiment reporters can suggest as pre-registered names in autocompletes.

feature_use.name: feature_used
feature_use.description: A feature was actively used (button click, form submit, ...).

feature_use.name: feature_dismissed
feature_use.description: A feature surface was dismissed / closed.

feature_use.name: screen_time_recorded
feature_use.description: Time spent on a specific screen.

funnel_step.name: funnel_step_reached
funnel_step.description: A step in a funnel was reached.

cta.name: link_clicked
cta.description: An outbound or internal link was clicked.

error.name: error_encountered
error.description: The user hit a client-side or server-side error.

performance.name: screen_load_recorded
performance.description: Time to first content paint on a screen.

experiment.name: experiment_variant_assigned
experiment.description: Subject was assigned to a variant of an A/B experiment. Records the assignment for the ExperimentAssignmentReportBuilder.

experiment.name: experiment_exposed
experiment.description: The subject was actually EXPOSED to the variant (assignment vs exposure gap matters).

lifecycle.name: user_activated
lifecycle.description: User completed first meaningful action (activation event).
